title: notha vanilla+ modpack
description: sticking to the simplicity of the base game and feeling of being lost
body:
As the name suggest, **notha vanilla+ modpack** this is another vanilla plus modpack

It adds many structures and little additions that make tha game feel refreshing but also vanilla

It adds new weapons, bosses, nether and end expansions, mobs, 2 new dimensions, plenty of small additions, its own shaders, and mutch more to offer

The modpack is aimed to be as lightweight as possible and tries to backport as many future updates as it can.
